riskFactors: GFI is a protocol/governance token, not a direct redeemable claim on a specific RWA reserve asset.
Private credit exposure in Goldfinch products carries borrower, underwriting, default, and liquidity risk.
Public legal opinion URL for GFI was not found during initial scaffold research.
No on-chain proof-of-reserves oracle was identified for GFI.
Market, holder concentration, audit, and liquidity data require refresh before production grading.
mitigants: Official website, docs, governance, app, and public Ethereum token contract are available for further research.
Protocol-level market and TVL references are available through DeFiLlama and market-data aggregators.
GFI contract address is publicly visible on Ethereum and can be independently verified through Etherscan.
assessmentMethod: Initial scaffold risk note based on source discovery. Scores intentionally left null until full evidence-based layer research and grading are completed.
